stemHtml: When used at or close to the magnetic poles, a magnetic compass will be unreliable. Why is that? Due to…

options.a: An increase in both, the vertical and the horizontal magnetic field strength.
options.b: A decrease in both, the vertical and the horizontal magnetic field strength.
options.c: The fluctuations in the earth's magnetic field strength.
options.d: A decrease in the horizontal magnetic field strength.
